items.title: Pelosi institute launching at Berkeley after former speaker leaves Congress
items.desc: Nancy Pelosi will lend her name to a new UC Berkeley institute focused on democracy and public leadership, opening January 2027 after she leaves Congress.

items.desc:
MGM+

From Season 4 aired its finale episode, and made some big reveals and even bigger changes in the process. But was it enough? From will end with Season 5, making Season 4 the penultimate chapter of the series. That’s a pivotal place to be, especially now…

items.title: A severe El Niño could threaten something essential to half of humanity – rice
items.desc: Rice is life for billions of people. But this grain crop depends heavily on irrigation – and the looming El Niño is likely to bring dry conditions.
